summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building processes grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always ask 'why does this exist?' and 'how could this be automated?'—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Audit 300+ leave cases through rigorous {data|data analysis} to surface trends and diagnose {coord|root causes}, refuting cost assumptions with evidence
Translate findings on $362K in leave costs into {coord|actionable process improvements}—policy redesigns and first aid training
Design and continuously improve {coord|workflows and processes} for 20+ programs, reducing manual effort and onboarding time by 75%
Identify repetitive workflows and {tools|deploy AI tools} to handle work at scale, increasing capacity and quality
Analyze program and engagement {data|data} to diagnose root causes and translate findings into {coord|process improvements}
Triage inbound requests and {cross|coordinate across Marketing, Tech, and Sales teams} to reach resolution quickly
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|data points} to surface trends and amplify the voice of the customer for C-suite decisions
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that drove change
Owned a {cross|feedback loop} between stakeholders and leadership, ensuring real input shaped strategic plans
Improved process and {ex|experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects spanning survey development, recognition, and L&D
Optimized onboarding processes for new hires across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Built a checklist-based workflow to standardize a fragmented process, reducing complaints and turnaround time
Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Strengthened {ex|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Provided responsive, high-quality {ex|customer service} support to candidates, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Coordinated job postings, scheduling, and recruiting logistics for a challenging international role
Researched global compensation details and managed recruiting data across HR functions
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

changeLog: 2026-05-31: Tailored for Unit — Support Operations Specialist (NYC, fintech). Umbrella title → Strategic Program Manager (process/ops-improvement framing). Location → New York, NY. JD: design/build automated workflows; deploy AI tools; own support tech stack; analyze support data → root causes → process/product improvements; partner w/ Eng/Product; triage complex inquiries; own customer-Product feedback loop. 1-2 yrs support ops or building AI/automated workflows; Zapier/scripts/AI. Surfaced process-improvement + root-cause analysis + AI-tool deployment + feedback loop + customer service. Added RAG-build project (real, true) to evidence AI/automation. Skills → Data & Automation line. HONEST GAP: not a Zapier/scripting engineer; candid in essays. No invented numbers.
